taskSummary: Fix Project Dashboard regressions for Mural OAuth routing, stage status labels and optional Mural idle state.
diagnosis: The Mural client still routed pages.dev hosts directly to the production Worker, bypassing the Pages API proxy and preview Worker.
The status-strip tags were static and were not updated after project data loaded.
The initial Mural state implied a required check rather than an optional integration.
changes: Restored same-origin Mural API routing by default in public/components/mural-integration.js.
Removed the production Worker fallback from the dashboard Mural client.
Added an apiUrl helper for /api/mural calls.
Changed Mural idle copy to optional integration language.
Added connected return handling for mural=connected.
Broadened project stage field aliases in public/js/project-dashboard.js.
Updated status-strip tags from loaded project data.
Updated Nunjucks loading labels and route-state tests.

details: Preview Worker deploy triggers do not include chore/** even though this PR branch is chore/govuk-frontend-integration.
The Wrangler deploy secrets list does not include MURAL_CLIENT_SECRET.
A workflow update was attempted but blocked by the tool layer.

residualRisk: If the Mural callback still returns missing_secret after these client fixes deploy, the remaining issue is Worker secret/deployment configuration rather than the dashboard route client.
